landing.hero.title: From Basics to Fluency with
landing.hero.subtitle: Engaging, personalized private online Spanish lessons for all levels – fun, relatable, and effective.
landing.about.title: I'll be your guide on your journey to mastering the Spanish language and culture
landing.about.desc1: I am thrilled to share my passion for the Spanish language and culture with you.
landing.about.desc2: Whether you're just starting out or aiming for fluency, let's transform your Spanish goals into reality. Book a lesson, and let's embark on this incredible journey together!
landing.packages.title: Lesson Packages
landing.packages.30min.title: 30 Min Class
landing.packages.30min.desc: 5 lessons x 30 minutes — perfect for quick conversation practice. Save 3%!
landing.packages.45min.title: 45 Min Class
landing.packages.45min.desc: 5 lessons x 45 minutes — ideal balance of depth and convenience. Save 3%!
landing.packages.60min.title: 60 Min Class
landing.packages.60min.desc: 5 lessons x 60 minutes — the full immersive experience. Save 3%!
landing.single.title: Single Lessons
landing.single.subtitle: Just one lesson — no packages, no discounts, full flexibility.
landing.single.30min.title: 30 Min Single
landing.single.30min.desc: One 30-minute session — perfect to try it out or practice a quick conversation.
landing.single.45min.title: 45 Min Single
landing.single.45min.desc: One 45-minute session — ideal balance of depth and flexibility.
landing.single.60min.title: 60 Min Single
landing.single.60min.desc: One full 60-minute session — the complete immersive experience.
landing.faq.title: Common Questions
landing.faq.a1: I welcome learners of all language levels, from complete beginners to advanced speakers. My experience allows me to tailor lessons to meet the needs of each individual.
landing.faq.a2: You have the flexibility to choose your preferred time by checking my calendar. Optionally, you can opt for a fixed schedule setting a lesson every week at the same time and day.
landing.faq.q3: How will the first lesson be?
landing.faq.a3: The first lesson is 30 minutes long. We will identify your needs, assess your level, and develop a personalized learning plan.
dashboard.title: My Lessons
dashboard.subtitle: Keep track of your upcoming Spanish sessions.
dashboard.empty.title: No Upcoming Lessons
dashboard.empty.subtitle: You haven't booked any lessons yet. Start your journey today.
payment.success.title: Booking Confirmed!
payment.success.subtitle: Your payment was successful and your lesson is scheduled. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly.
payment.cancelled.title: Payment Cancelled
payment.cancelled.subtitle: The payment process was not completed. Don't worry, you can try again whenever you're ready.
landing.booking.title: Book Your Session
landing.booking.subtitle: Select a time that suits you and complete your details to confirm the lesson.

lesson.cancelPrompt: Are you sure you want to cancel this lesson? The time slot will become available for other students.
